zh.lifeSummary: Bertha於大約1045年出生在法國巴-諾門迪奧內。她於1061年與Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday在法國諾門迪結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1095年7月30日在英國德比夏爾德比享年51歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾圖特波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Bertha于大约1045年出生在法国巴-諾門迪奧內。她于1061年与Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday在法国諾門迪结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1095年7月30日在英国德比夏爾德比享年51岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾圖特波利。

nameMeanings.name: Bertha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of a Continental Germanic name, a short form of various compound women's personal names derived from berht ‘famous’ (akin to Modern English bright). It probably existed in England before the Conquest, and was certainly reinforced by Norman use, but fell out of use in the 15th century. It was reintroduced into the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century, but has once again gone out of fashion.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: Bertha was born about 1045, in Orne, Lower Normandy, France. She married Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday in 1061, in Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 30 July 1095, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Bertha est née environ 1045, à Orne, Basse-Normandie, France. Elle a épousé Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday en 1061, à Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 juillet 1095, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Tutbury, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Bertha wurde um 1045 in Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren. Sie hat 1061 in Normandie, Frankreich Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Juli 1095 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Derby, Derbyshire, England und wurde in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Bertha è nata il circa 1045 nel Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia. Lei sposato Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday nel 1061, nel Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 30 luglio 1095, nel Derby, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Tutbury, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Berthaは約1045年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンで生まれた。1061年にフランスノーマンディでHenry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesdayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1095年7月30日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーで51歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアトゥトブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bertha(은)는 대략 1045년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1061년 프랑스 노먼디에서 Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1095년 7월 30일 영국 더비실르 더비에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 튜트버이에 묻혔다.

mn.Darley, Derbyshire, England: Darley, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Bertha nasceu aproximadamente 1045, em Orne, Basse-Normandie, França. Ela casou-se com Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday em 1061, em Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de julho de 1095, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Bertha родилась около 1045 г. в местности орн, бассе-норманди, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday в 1061 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 30 июля 1095 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности тутбури, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Bertha nació aproximadamente 1045, en Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia. Se casó con Henry de Ferrières Sire de Ferrieres and Chambrais - Domesday en 1061, en Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 30 de julio de 1095, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
